criteria.text: artifacts minted through the stamp seam carry model: sha256 digests equal to the resolved model's Digest(), identical across repeated runs, proven by behavioral tests over the mint paths
every production Frozen/Provenance mint routes its digest through StampProvenance — no mint site bypasses the seam, proven by source-witness checks
artifacts and fixtures stamped before the field existed decode unchanged and no committed fixture regenerates, proven by the existing fixture gates running green without modification
